title: DiagnosticReport (note-type LOINC) with base64 presentedForm -> one note row, zero measurement/observation rows
notes:
Real Synthea DiagnosticReport db8f7873-d913-d80c-7b77-8c5a15ea168c (US Core diagnosticreport-note profile). DR.code has two LOINC codings: 34117-2 (History and physical note) and 51847-2 (Evaluation + Plan note). status=final. effectiveDateTime 1995-10-26T03:00:51+01:00. presentedForm[0].data is a base64 text/plain note body; no conclusion, no code.text.

TWO independent pipelines read this report.

1) DiagnosticReport__note (PER-REPORT, one row). View takes code.coding.where(system=loinc).code.first() = 34117-2; stage-2 walks LOINC 34117-2 -> Maps to standard -> concept_id 3030023 'History and physical note' (vocab.concept: domain Note, vocabulary LOINC, standard_concept S) => note_class_concept_id=3030023. Constants verified in vocab.concept: note_type_concept_id=32817 'EHR', encoding_concept_id=32678 'UTF-8', language_concept_id=4180186 'English language'. note_text = convert_from(decode(presentedForm.data,'base64'),'UTF-8') (the conclusion / code_text fallbacks are unused here). note_title = left(code.text,250) which is NULL because the report has no code.text. note_date / note_datetime from effectiveDateTime (1995-10-26 / 1995-10-26 03:00:51). note_source_value = the LOINC code 34117-2 (left 50). provider_id from the Practitioner performer (getReferenceKey strips the Practitioner/ prefix); visit_occurrence_id from the encounter; person_id from subject. status passes the NOT IN (entered-in-error, cancelled, unknown) filter. => exactly ONE note row.

2) DiagnosticReport__measurement / __observation / __procedure_occurrence (PER-CODING fan-out via staging.diagnosticreport_resolved). Both codings 34117-2 and 51847-2 Map-to standard concepts whose domain_id is 'Note' (3030023, and 3041851 'Evaluation + Plan note' -- both LOINC / Note / standard). The three routing siblings filter WHERE std_domain in ('Measurement' / 'Observation' / 'Procedure') respectively, so NEITHER coding matches any of them. => ZERO measurement, observation, and procedure_occurrence rows. This is the documented behaviour in mapspec/etl/_resolve_diagnosticreport.sql lines 17-20: note-domain codings stay in the resolved table but are captured only by the per-report note edge.

Net OMOP output for this DiagnosticReport: 1 row, in note.

omop.note_text:
